review_note: Verification flags denote SOURCE PROVENANCE only (quran = Qur’anic verse; hadith = a hadith collection is cited; compilation = traditional/untraced wording). They are NOT an authenticity grading. No entry has been confirmed by a qualified scholar; treat all content as provisional until reviewed.

items.title: Acceptance of Deeds
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
items.transliteration: Rabbana taqabbal minna innaka Antas-Sami’ul-‘Alim.
items.translation: Our Lord, accept this from us. Indeed, You alone are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

items.title: Make Us Muslims Submitting to You
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَاجْعَلْنَا مُسْلِمَيْنِ لَكَ وَمِنْ ذُرِّيَّتِنَا أُمَّةً مُسْلِمَةً لَكَ وَأَرِنَا مَنَاسِكَنَا وَتُبْ عَلَيْنَا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
items.transliteration: Rabbana wajalna muslimayni laka wa min dhurriyyatina ummatan muslimatan laka wa arina manasikana wa tub alayna innaka Antat-Tawwabur-Rahim.
items.translation: Our Lord, make us submissive to You and from our descendants a community submissive to You; show us our rites and accept our repentance. Indeed, You are the Accepting of repentance, the Merciful.

items.title: Good in this World and the Hereafter
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
items.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina adhaban-nar.
items.translation: Our Lord, grant us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

items.title: Patience and Firmness
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا وَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbana afrigh ‘alayna sabran wa thabbit aqdamana wansurna ‘alal-qawmil-kafirin.
items.translation: Our Lord, pour patience upon us, make our feet firm, and grant us victory over the disbelieving people.

items.title: Keep Hearts Firm
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْوَهَّابُ
items.transliteration: Rabbana la tuzigh qulubana bada idh hadaytana wa hab lana min ladunka rahmah, innaka Antal-Wahhab.
items.translation: Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us, and grant us mercy from Yourself. Indeed, You are the Bestower.

items.title: Gathering Without Doubt
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ جَامِعُ النَّاسِ لِيَوْمٍ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهِ إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُخْلِفُ الْمِيعَادَ
items.transliteration: Rabbana innaka jamiun-nasi liyawmin la rayba fih, innallaha la yukhliful-miad.
items.translation: Our Lord, surely You will gather mankind for a Day about which there is no doubt. Indeed, Allah does not fail in His promise.

items.title: Forgive and Protect From Fire
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا آمَنَّا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
items.transliteration: Rabbana innana amanna faghfir lana dhunubana wa qina adhaban-nar.
items.translation: Our Lord, indeed we have believed, so forgive us our sins and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

items.title: Righteous Offspring
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ ذُرِّيَّةً طَيِّبَةً إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ الدُّعَاءِ
items.transliteration: Rabbana hab lana mil-ladunka dhurriyyatan tayyibah, innaka sami'ud-du'a.
items.translation: Our Lord, grant me from Yourself a goodly offspring. Truly You are the Hearer of supplication.

items.title: Believe in What Was Revealed
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا آمَنَّا بِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ وَاتَّبَعْنَا الرَّسُولَ فَاكْتُبْنَا مَعَ الشَّاهِدِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbana amanna bima anzalta wattabanar-rasula faktubna maash-shahidin.
items.translation: Our Lord, we have believed in what You revealed and followed the Messenger, so record us among the witnesses.

items.title: Forgiveness and Steadfastness
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَإِسْرَافَنَا فِي أَمْرِنَا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا وَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbana-ghfir lana dhunubana wa israfana fi amrina wa thabbit aqdamana wansurna ‘alal-qawmil-kafirin.
items.translation: Our Lord, forgive our sins and excesses in our affairs, make our feet firm, and grant us victory over the disbelieving people.

items.title: Allah is Sufficient, the Best Disposer
items.arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
items.transliteration: Hasbunallahu wa ni'mal-wakil.
items.translation: Allah is sufficient for us, and He is the best Disposer of affairs.

items.title: You Did Not Create This in Vain
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا مَا خَلَقْتَ هَٰذَا بَاطِلًا سُبْحَانَكَ فَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
items.transliteration: Rabbana ma khalaqta hadha batilan subhanaka faqina adhaban-nar.
items.translation: Our Lord, You did not create this in vain. Glory be to You, so protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

items.title: Remove Shame on the Day
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ مَنْ تُدْخِلِ النَّارَ فَقَدْ أَخْزَيْتَهُ وَمَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ مِنْ أَنْصَارٍ
items.transliteration: Rabbana innaka man tudkhilin-nara faqad akhzaytah, wa ma liz-zalimina min ansar.
items.translation: Our Lord, whoever You admit into the Fire has surely been disgraced, and the wrongdoers will have no helpers.

items.title: Faith, Forgiveness, and Righteous Death
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا سَمِعْنَا مُنَادِيًا يُنَادِي لِلْإِيمَانِ أَنْ آمِنُوا بِرَبِّكُمْ فَآمَنَّا رَبَّنَا فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَكَفِّرْ عَنَّا سَيِّئَاتِنَا وَتَوَفَّنَا مَعَ الْأَبْرَارِ
items.transliteration: Rabbana innana sami'na munadiyan yunadi lil-imani an aminu birabbikum fa-amanna. Rabbana faghfir lana dhunubana wa kaffir 'anna sayyi'atina wa tawaffana ma'al-abrar.
items.translation: Our Lord, indeed we heard a caller calling to faith, saying: Believe in the Lord, so faith was accepted. Our Lord, forgive sins, remove misdeeds, and cause death with the righteous.

items.title: Grant What Was Promised
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَآتِنَا مَا وَعَدْتَنَا عَلَىٰ رُسُلِكَ وَلَا تُخْزِنَا يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ إِنَّكَ لَا تُخْلِفُ الْمِيعَادَ
items.transliteration: Rabbana wa atina ma waadtana ala rusulika wa la tukhzina yawmal-qiyamah, innaka la tukhliful-miad.
items.translation: Our Lord, grant us what You promised through Your messengers, and do not disgrace us on the Day of Resurrection. Indeed, You do not fail in promise.

items.title: Do Not Place Us With Wrongdoers
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا مَعَ الْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbana la tajalna maal-qawmiz-zalimin.
items.translation: Our Lord, do not place us with the wrongdoing people.

items.title: Decide Between People Truth
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا افْتَحْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ قَوْمِنَا بِالْحَقِّ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْفَاتِحِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbanaftah baynana wa bayna qawmina bil-haqqi wa anta khayrul-fatihin.
items.translation: Our Lord, decide between us and our people in truth; You are the best of those who decide.

items.title: Reliance and Rescue
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا عَلَى اللَّهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِلْقَوْمِ الظَّالِمِينَ وَنَجِّنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ مِنَ الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbana ‘alallahi tawakkalna. Rabbana la taj‘alna fitnatan lil-qawmiz-zalimin. Wa najjina birahmatika minal-qawmil-kafirin.
items.translation: Our Lord, upon Allah we rely. Our Lord, do not make us a trial for the wrongdoing people, and save us by Your mercy from the disbelieving people.

items.title: Make Establisher Prayer Offspring
items.arabic: رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِي رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَاءِ
items.transliteration: Rabbij-alni muqimas-salati wa min dhurriyyati, Rabbana wa taqabbal du'a.
items.translation: My Lord, make me an establisher of prayer, and from my offspring too. Our Lord, accept my supplication.

items.title: Forgiveness on the Day of Reckoning
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ
items.transliteration: Rabbanaghfir li wa li-walidayya wa lil-mu'minina yawma yaqumul-hisab.
items.translation: Our Lord, forgive me, my parents, and the believers on the Day the reckoning takes place.

items.title: Have Mercy Upon Them
items.arabic: رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا
items.transliteration: Rabbir-hamhuma kama rabbayani saghira.
items.translation: My Lord, have mercy upon them as they raised me when I was small.

items.title: Right Guidance
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
items.transliteration: Rabbana atina min ladunka rahmatan wa hayyi’ lana min amrina rashada.
items.translation: Our Lord, grant us mercy from Yourself and prepare right guidance for us in our affair.

items.title: Excerpt: Expand My Chest and Ease My Task
items.arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
items.transliteration: Rabbish-rah li sadri wa yassir li amri.
items.translation: My Lord, expand for me my chest and make my task easy for me.

items.title: Increase in Knowledge
items.arabic: رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
items.transliteration: Rabbi zidni ilma.
items.translation: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

items.title: Dua of Yunus
items.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minaz-zalimin.
items.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except You. Glory be to You. Indeed, I was among the wrongdoers.

items.title: Blessed Landing
items.arabic: رَبِّ أَنْزِلْنِي مُنْزَلًا مُبَارَكًا وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الْمُنْزِلِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbi anzilni munzalan mubarakan wa Anta khayrul-munzilin.
items.translation: My Lord, let me land at a blessed landing place, and You are the best to accommodate.

items.title: Refuge From Devils
items.arabic: رَبِّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ رَبِّ أَنْ يَحْضُرُونِ
items.transliteration: Rabbi audhu bika min hamazatish-shayatin, wa audhu bika Rabbi an yahdurun.
items.translation: My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils, and I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me.

items.title: Turn Away Hellfire
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا
items.transliteration: Rabbana-srif anna adhaba jahannama inna adhahaha kana gharama.
items.translation: Our Lord, turn away from us the punishment of Hell. Indeed, its punishment is ever clinging.

items.title: Family as Comfort of Eyes
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
items.transliteration: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyyatina qurrata a'yunin waj'alna lil-muttaqina imama.
items.translation: Our Lord, grant us comfort of the eyes from our spouses and offspring, and make us leaders for the righteous.

items.title: Excerpt: Wisdom and Righteous Company
items.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِالصَّالِحِينَ وَاجْعَلْ لِي لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِي الْآخِرِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنْ وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ النَّعِيمِ
items.transliteration: Rabbi hab li hukman wa alhiqni bis-salihin, waj‘al li lisana sidqin fil-akhirin, waj‘alni min warathati jannatin-na‘im.
items.translation: My Lord, grant me wisdom, join me with the righteous, grant me honorable mention among later generations, and make me among the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss.

items.title: Gratitude and Righteous Deeds
items.arabic: رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَالِدَيَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِي عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbi awzini an ashkura nimataka allati anamta alayya wa ala walidayya wa an amala salihan tardah, wa adkhilni birahmatika fi ibadikas-salihin.
items.translation: My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor upon me and my parents, to do righteous deeds that please You, and admit me by Your mercy among Your righteous servants.

items.title: Forgiveness after Mistake
items.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي
items.transliteration: Rabbi inni zalamtu nafsi faghfir li.
items.translation: My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, so forgive me.

items.title: Need of Allah's Goodness
items.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي لِمَا أَنزَلْتَ إِلَيَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ
items.transliteration: Rabbi inni lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqir.
items.translation: My Lord, indeed I am in need of whatever good You send down to me.

items.title: Righteous Child
items.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنَ الصَّالِحِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbi hab li minas-salihin.
items.translation: My Lord, grant me a righteous child.

items.title: Forgiveness for Believers
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَسِعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَةً وَعِلْمًا فَاغْفِرْ لِلَّذِينَ تَابُوا وَاتَّبَعُوا سَبِيلَكَ وَقِهِمْ عَذَابَ الْجَحِيمِ
items.transliteration: Rabbana wasi‘ta kulla shay’in rahmatan wa ‘ilman faghfir lilladhina tabu wattaba‘u sabilaka wa qihim ‘adhabal-jahim.
items.translation: Our Lord, You encompass all things in mercy and knowledge, so forgive those who repent and follow Your way, and protect them from the punishment of Hellfire.

items.title: Dua for Mounting and Return to Allah
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
items.transliteration: Subhanalladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun.
items.translation: Glory be to the One who subjected this to service, and it could not have been controlled without Him. Surely, return is to the Lord.

items.title: Clean Hearts toward Believers
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَانِنَا الَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِالْإِيمَانِ وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِي قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّا لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا رَبَّنَا إِنَّكَ رَءُوفٌ رَحِيمٌ
items.transliteration: Rabbana-ghfir lana wa li-ikhwaninal-ladhina sabaquna bil-iman, wa la taj‘al fi qulubina ghillan lilladhina amanu. Rabbana innaka Ra’ufur-Rahim.
items.translation: Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith, and do not place hatred in our hearts toward those who believe. Our Lord, You are Most Kind, Most Merciful.

items.title: Complete Light and Forgive
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا أَتْمِمْ لَنَا نُورَنَا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: Rabbana atmim lana nurana waghfir lana innaka ala kulli shayin qadir.
items.translation: Our Lord, complete our light for us and forgive us. Indeed, You are over all things competent.

items.title: Forgiveness for Parents, Believers, and Household
items.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِمَنْ دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًا
items.transliteration: Rabbi-ghfir li wa li-walidayya wa liman dakhala baytiya mu'minan wa lil-mu'minina wal-mu'minati wa la tazidiz-zalimina illa tabara.
items.translation: My Lord, forgive me, my parents, whoever enters my house as a believer, and the believing men and women; and do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction.

items.title: After Rain
items.arabic: مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ
items.transliteration: Mutirna bifadli Allahi wa rahmatih.
items.translation: We have been given rain by Allah’s favour and mercy.

items.title: Before Sleeping
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِاسْمِكَ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
items.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya.
items.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live. (Before sleeping)

items.title: Beneficial Knowledge, Good Provision, Accepted Deeds
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka ilman nafi'an wa rizqan tayyiban wa amalan mutaqabbala.
items.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, wholesome provision, and accepted deeds.

items.title: Do Not Leave Me to Myself
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَحْمَتَكَ أَرْجُو فَلَا تَكِلْنِي إِلَى نَفْسِي طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي شَأْنِي كُلَّهُ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma rahmataka arju fala takilni ila nafsi tarfata ayn, wa aslih li sha'ni kullah, la ilaha illa anta.
items.translation: O Allah, it is Your mercy that I hope for, so do not leave me to myself even for the blink of an eye, and set right all my affairs. There is no god but You.

items.title: Dua for Ease
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
items.transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja‘altahu sahla, wa anta taj‘alul-hazna idha shi’ta sahla.
items.translation: O Allah, nothing is easy except what You make easy, and You make hardship easy when You will.

items.title: Dua for the Sick (seven times)
items.arabic: أَسْأَلُ اللهَ الْعَظِيمَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ أَنْ يَشْفِيَكَ
items.transliteration: As'alullahal-Azima Rabbal-Arshil-Azimi an yashfiyak.
items.translation: I ask Allah the Magnificent, Lord of the Magnificent Throne, to cure you.

items.title: During Rain
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا
items.transliteration: Allahumma sayyiban nafi‘a.
items.translation: O Allah, make it beneficial rain.

items.title: Dua During Wind
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا فِيهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا فِيهَا وَشَرِّ مَا أُرْسِلَتْ بِهِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha wa khayra ma fiha wa khayra ma ursilat bihi, wa a'udhu bika min sharriha wa sharri ma fiha wa sharri ma ursilat bihi.
items.translation: O Allah, grant the good of it, the good within it, and the good with which it was sent; and protect from its evil, the evil within it, and the evil with which it was sent.

items.title: Entering the Home
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
items.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa alallahi Rabbina tawakkalna.
items.translation: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon Allah our Lord we rely. (Entering the home)

items.title: Entering the Marketplace
items.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ، وَهُوَ حَيٌّ لَا يَمُوتُ، بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illa Allah wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd, yuhyi wa yumit, wa huwa hayyun la yamut, biyadihil-khayr, wa huwa ‘ala kulli shay’in qadir.
items.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah alone, without partner. His is the kingdom and His is praise. He gives life and causes death, and He is Ever-Living and does not die. In His hand is all good, and He has power over all things.

items.title: Entering the Masjid
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
items.transliteration: Allahummaftah li abwaba rahmatik.
items.translation: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.

items.title: For Healing
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ، أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ، اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي، لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ، شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
items.transliteration: Allahumma Rabban-nas, adh-hibil-ba’s, ishfi Antash-Shafi, la shifa’a illa shifa’uk, shifa’an la yughadiru saqama.
items.translation: O Allah, Lord of mankind, remove the harm and heal. You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing, a healing that leaves no illness.

items.title: If Bismillah Was Forgotten Before Eating
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ أَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ
items.transliteration: Bismillahi awwalahu wa akhirahu.
items.translation: In the name of Allah at its beginning and at its end.

items.title: If Forgotten Before Eating
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ فِي أَوَّلِهِ وَآخِرِهِ
items.transliteration: Bismillahi fi awwalihi wa akhirih.
items.translation: In the name of Allah at its beginning and its end.

items.title: Leaving the Mosque
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni as’aluka min fadlik.
items.translation: O Allah, I ask You from Your bounty.

items.title: Morning: Gratitude for Every Blessing
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِي مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ، فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْرُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma ma asbaha bi min ni'matin aw bi-ahadin min khalqika faminka wahdaka la sharika lak, falakal-hamdu wa lakash-shukr.
items.translation: O Allah, whatever favour has come to me or any of Your creation this morning is from You alone, with no partner. To You belongs all praise and all thanks.

items.title: Leaving Home: In Allah’s Name I Trust
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللهِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ
items.transliteration: Bismillah, tawakkaltu alallah, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah; there is no might nor power except with Allah. (Leaving the home)

items.title: On Hearing Thunder
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي يُسَبِّحُ الرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَالْمَلَائِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
items.transliteration: Subhanalladhi yusabbihur-ra‘du bihamdihi wal-mala’ikatu min khifatih.
items.translation: Glory be to the One whom thunder glorifies with His praise, and the angels from fear of Him.

items.title: Praise Who Fed Provided
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَٰذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
items.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi at'amani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah.
items.translation: All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me, without any power or strength on my part. (After eating)

items.title: Praise by Whose Favour Good Things Are Completed
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
items.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi bi-ni'matihi tatimmus-salihat.
items.translation: All praise is for Allah by whose favour good things are completed.

items.title: Protection for Children
items.arabic: أُعِيذُكُمَا بِكَلِمَاتِ اللهِ التَّامَّةِ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْطَانٍ وَهَامَّةٍ وَمِنْ كُلِّ عَيْنٍ لَامَّةٍ
items.transliteration: U'idhukuma bi-kalimatillahit-tammah, min kulli shaytanin wa hammah, wa min kulli aynin lammah.
items.translation: I seek protection for you both in the perfect words of Allah from every devil, every vermin, and every harmful, envious eye. (Said over children)

items.title: Refuge from Poverty, Scarcity and Humiliation
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْفَقْرِ، وَالْقِلَّةِ، وَالذِّلَّةِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-faqri wal-qillati wadh-dhillah.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from poverty, scarcity, and humiliation.

items.title: Relief from Anxiety
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ، وَضَلَعِ الدَّيْنِ وَغَلَبَةِ الرِّجَالِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan, wal-ajzi wal-kasal, wal-bukhli wal-jubn, wa dala'id-dayni wa ghalabatir-rijal.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from anxiety and grief, from incapacity and laziness, from miserliness and cowardice, from the burden of debt and being overpowered by men.

items.title: Reply to One Who Sneezes
items.arabic: يَرْحَمُكَ اللَّهُ
items.transliteration: Yarhamukallah.
items.translation: May Allah have mercy on you.

items.title: Returning from Travel
items.arabic: آيِبُونَ، تَائِبُونَ، عَابِدُونَ، لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
items.transliteration: Ayibun, ta’ibun, abidun, li Rabbina hamidun.
items.translation: Returning, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord.

items.title: Seeing Someone Afflicted
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلَاكَ بِهِ، وَفَضَّلَنِي عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِمَّنْ خَلَقَ تَفْضِيلًا
items.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi afani mimma ibtalaka bih, wa faddalani ala kathirin mimman khalaqa tafdila.
items.translation: Praise be to Allah who spared me from what He tested you with and favoured me over many of those He created.

items.title: Suffice Me with the Lawful
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
items.transliteration: Allahummak-fini bi-halalika an haramik, wa aghnini bi-fadlika amman siwak.
items.translation: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful against what You have forbidden, and enrich me by Your grace, independent of all besides You.

items.title: The Sneezer's Reply
items.arabic: يَهْدِيكُمُ اللَّهُ وَيُصْلِحُ بَالَكُمْ
items.transliteration: Yahdikumullahu wa yuslihu balakum.
items.translation: May Allah guide you and set your affairs right.

items.title: Dua at Times of Distress
items.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الْأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illallahul-Azimul-Halim, la ilaha illallahu Rabbul-Arshil-Azim, la ilaha illallahu Rabbus-samawati wa Rabbul-ardi wa Rabbul-Arshil-Karim.
items.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, the Magnificent, the Forbearing. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the Magnificent Throne. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, Lord of the heavens, Lord of the earth, and Lord of the Noble Throne.

items.title: Visiting the Sick
items.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ، طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللهُ
items.transliteration: La ba’sa, tahurun in sha Allah.
items.translation: No harm; it is purification, Allah willing.

items.title: Wellbeing in this World and the Hereafter
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي دِينِي وَدُنْيَايَ وَأَهْلِي وَمَالِي، اللَّهُمَّ اسْتُرْ عَوْرَاتِي وَآمِنْ رَوْعَاتِي، اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ وَمِنْ خَلْفِي وَعَنْ يَمِينِي وَعَنْ شِمَالِي وَمِنْ فَوْقِي، وَأَعُوذُ بِعَظَمَتِكَ أَنْ أُغْتَالَ مِنْ تَحْتِي
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afiyata fid-dunya wal-akhirah. Allahumma inni as'alukal-'afwa wal-'afiyata fi dini wa dunyaya wa ahli wa mali. Allahummastur 'awrati wa amin raw'ati. Allahummahfazni min bayni yadayya wa min khalfi wa 'an yamini wa 'an shimali wa min fawqi, wa a'udhu bi'azamatika an ughtala min tahti.
items.translation: O Allah, wellbeing is sought in this world and the Hereafter. O Allah, pardon and wellbeing are sought in religion, worldly affairs, family, and wealth. O Allah, conceal faults, calm fears, protect from the front, behind, right, left, and above, and protection is sought by greatness from being seized from beneath.
items.source: Sunan Abi Dawud 5074; Sunan Ibn Majah 3871

items.title: When Angry: Seeking Refuge in Allah
items.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
items.transliteration: A‘udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajim.
items.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan.

items.title: When Wearing New Clothes
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ كَسَوْتَنِيهِ، أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهِ وَخَيْرِ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma lakal-hamdu Anta kasawtanih, as’aluka min khayrihi wa khayri ma suni’a lah, wa a’udhu bika min sharrihi wa sharri ma suni’a lah.
items.translation: O Allah, praise is Yours. You clothed me with it. I ask You for its good and the good for which it was made, and I seek refuge in You from its evil and the evil for which it was made.

items.title: Asking for All Good, Now and Later
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنَ الْخَيْرِ كُلِّهِ عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ، مَا عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَمَا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الشَّرِّ كُلِّهِ عَاجِلِهِ وَآجِلِهِ، مَا عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَمَا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا سَأَلَكَ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا عَاذَ بِهِ عَبْدُكَ وَنَبِيُّكَ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ وَمَا قَرَّبَ إِلَيْهَا مِنْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ عَمَلٍ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ كُلَّ قَضَاءٍ قَضَيْتَهُ لِي خَيْرًا
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka minal-khayri kullihi 'ajilihi wa ajilihi, ma 'alimtu minhu wa ma lam a'lam. Wa a'udhu bika minash-sharri kullihi 'ajilihi wa ajilihi, ma 'alimtu minhu wa ma lam a'lam. Allahumma inni as'aluka min khayri ma sa'alaka 'abduka wa nabiyyuka, wa a'udhu bika min sharri ma 'adha bihi 'abduka wa nabiyyuka. Allahumma inni as'alukal-jannata wa ma qarraba ilayha min qawlin aw 'amal, wa a'udhu bika minan-nari wa ma qarraba ilayha min qawlin aw 'amal, wa as'aluka an taj'ala kulla qada'in qadaytahu li khayra.
items.translation: O Allah, all good is sought, immediate and later, known and unknown; and protection is sought from all evil, immediate and later, known and unknown. The good asked by the servant and Prophet is sought, and protection is sought from the evil from which the servant and Prophet sought refuge. Paradise and what brings near to it are sought, protection from the Fire and what brings near to it is sought, and every decree is asked to be made good.

items.title: Asking for Guidance and Right Aim
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالسَّدَادَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-huda was-sadad.
items.translation: O Allah, I ask You for guidance and uprightness.

items.title: Benefit Me by What You Taught Me
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي وَزِدْنِي عِلْمًا
items.transliteration: Allahumman-fa'ni bima allamtani wa allimni ma yanfa'uni wa zidni ilma.
items.translation: O Allah, benefit me by what You have taught me, teach me what will benefit me, and increase me in knowledge.

items.title: Salat al-Istikhara (Prayer for Guidance)
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ، وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ، فَإِنَّكَ تَقْدِرُ وَلَا أَقْدِرُ، وَتَعْلَمُ وَلَا أَعْلَمُ، وَأَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَٰذَا الْأَمْرَ خَيْرٌ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاقْدُرْهُ لِي وَيَسِّرْهُ لِي ثُمَّ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ، وَإِنْ كُنْتَ تَعْلَمُ أَنَّ هَٰذَا الْأَمْرَ شَرٌّ لِي فِي دِينِي وَمَعَاشِي وَعَاقِبَةِ أَمْرِي فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَاصْرِفْنِي عَنْهُ وَاقْدُرْ لِيَ الْخَيْرَ حَيْثُ كَانَ ثُمَّ أَرْضِنِي بِهِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni astakhiruka bi-ilmik, wa astaqdiruka bi-qudratik, wa as'aluka min fadlikal-azim, fa-innaka taqdiru wa la aqdir, wa ta'lamu wa la a'lam, wa anta allamul-ghuyub. Allahumma in kunta ta'lamu anna hadhal-amra khayrun li fi dini wa ma'ashi wa aqibati amri faqdurhu li wa yassirhu li thumma barik li fih. Wa in kunta ta'lamu anna hadhal-amra sharrun li fi dini wa ma'ashi wa aqibati amri fasrifhu anni wasrifni anhu waqdur liyal-khayra haythu kana thumma ardini bih.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek Your guidance by Your knowledge, and Your strength by Your power, and I ask of Your great bounty. You have power and I have none, You know and I know not, and You are the Knower of the unseen. O Allah, if You know this matter to be good for me in my religion, my livelihood, and the outcome of my affairs, then decree it for me, make it easy for me, and bless it for me. And if You know this matter to be bad for me in my religion, my livelihood, and the outcome of my affairs, then turn it away from me and turn me away from it, and decree for me what is good wherever it may be, and make me content with it.

items.title: Entering Toilet
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni audhu bika minal-khubuthi wal-khabaith.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from male and female devils.

items.title: Entering the Home
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
items.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa ala Rabbina tawakkalna.
items.translation: In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.

items.title: For Good Character
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي لِأَحْسَنِ الْأَخْلَاقِ، لَا يَهْدِي لِأَحْسَنِهَا إِلَّا أَنْتَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma ihdini li ahsanil-akhlaq, la yahdi li ahsaniha illa Anta.
items.translation: O Allah, guide me to the best character; none guides to the best of it except You.

items.title: For Light
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ فِي قَلْبِي نُورًا، وَفِي لِسَانِي نُورًا، وَفِي سَمْعِي نُورًا، وَفِي بَصَرِي نُورًا
items.transliteration: Allahumma-j’al fi qalbi nura, wa fi lisani nura, wa fi sam’i nura, wa fi basari nura.
items.translation: O Allah, place light in my heart, light on my tongue, light in my hearing, and light in my sight.

items.title: Guidance, Piety, Chastity and Contentment
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'alukal-huda wat-tuqa wal-afafa wal-ghina.
items.translation: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency.

items.title: Help to Remember, Thank and Worship
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma a'inni ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni ibadatik.
items.translation: O Allah, help me to remember You, to thank You, and to worship You in the best manner.

items.title: Leaving Toilet
items.arabic: غُفْرَانَكَ
items.transliteration: Ghufranak.
items.translation: I seek Your forgiveness.

items.title: O Turner of Hearts, Keep My Heart Firm
items.arabic: يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَى دِينِكَ
items.transliteration: Ya muqallibal-qulubi thabbit qalbi ala dinik.
items.translation: O Turner of hearts, keep my heart firm upon Your religion.

items.title: Witr Qunut
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي فِيمَنْ هَدَيْتَ، وَعَافِنِي فِيمَنْ عَافَيْتَ، وَتَوَلَّنِي فِيمَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَ، وَبَارِكْ لِي فِيمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَقِنِي شَرَّ مَا قَضَيْتَ، فَإِنَّكَ تَقْضِي وَلَا يُقْضَى عَلَيْكَ، وَإِنَّهُ لَا يَذِلُّ مَنْ وَالَيْتَ، تَبَارَكْتَ رَبَّنَا وَتَعَالَيْتَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma ihdini fiman hadayt, wa afini fiman afayt, wa tawallani fiman tawallayt, wa barik li fima atayt, wa qini sharra ma qadayt, fa innaka taqdi wa la yuqda alayk, wa innahu la yadhillu man walayt, tabarakta Rabbana wa taalayt.
items.translation: O Allah, guide me among those You have guided, grant me well-being among those You have granted well-being, take me into Your care among those You have taken into Your care, bless me in what You have given, and protect me from the evil of what You have decreed. Indeed, You decree and none can decree over You. Whoever You support is not humiliated. Blessed are You, our Lord, and Exalted.
items.source: Sunan Abi Dawud 1425; Jami at-Tirmidhi 464; Sunan an-Nasai 1745

items.title: Protection from Four Trials (before salam)
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَمِنْ عَذَابِ جَهَنَّمَ، وَمِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni audhu bika min adhibil-qabr, wa min adhabi jahannam, wa min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat, wa min sharri fitnatil-masihid-dajjal.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, the punishment of Hell, the trials of life and death, and the evil trial of the False Messiah.

items.title: Refuge from Knowledge that Does Not Benefit
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ لَا يَنْفَعُ، وَمِنْ قَلْبٍ لَا يَخْشَعُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min ilmin la yanfa', wa min qalbin la yakhsha'.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from knowledge that does not benefit and from a heart that does not humble itself.

items.title: Set Right My Religion, World and Hereafter
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَصْلِحْ لِي دِينِيَ الَّذِي هُوَ عِصْمَةُ أَمْرِي، وَأَصْلِحْ لِي دُنْيَايَ الَّتِي فِيهَا مَعَاشِي
items.transliteration: Allahumma aslih li diniyal-ladhi huwa ismatu amri, wa aslih li dunyayal-lati fiha ma'ashi.
items.translation: O Allah, set right my religion which is the safeguard of my affairs, and set right my worldly life in which is my living.

items.title: When Wearing Clothes
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي كَسَانِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
items.transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi kasani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah.
items.translation: All praise is for Allah who clothed me with this and provided it for me without any ability or power from me.

items.title: Pleased with Allah, Islam and the Prophet
items.arabic: رَضِيتُ بِاللهِ رَبًّا، وَبِالْإِسْلَامِ دِينًا، وَبِمُحَمَّدٍ ﷺ نَبِيًّا
items.transliteration: Raditu billahi Rabban, wa bil-Islami dinan, wa bi-Muhammadin nabiyya.
items.translation: I am pleased with Allah as my Lord, with Islam as my religion, and with Muhammad as my Prophet.

items.title: Glory Praise
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
items.transliteration: Subhanallahi wa bihamdih.
items.translation: Glory and praise be to Allah.

items.title: Healing
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي فِي جَسَدِي وَرَدَّ عَلَيَّ رُوحِي وَأَذِنَ لِي بِذِكْرِهِ
items.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi afani fi jasadi wa radda alayya ruhi wa adhina li bi-dhikrih.
items.translation: All praise is for Allah who restored my health, returned my soul to me, and permitted me to remember Him.

items.title: Morning Master Remembrance
items.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa ala kulli shayin qadir.
items.translation: We have entered the morning and dominion belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. His is the dominion and praise, and He is over all things competent.

items.title: Morning Refuge From Disbelief and Poverty
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالْفَقْرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni audhu bika minal-kufri wal-faqr, wa audhu bika min adhibil-qabr, la ilaha illa Anta.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from disbelief and poverty, and I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave. There is no god but You.

items.title: Morning Wellbeing Request
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma afini fi badani, Allahumma afini fi sami, Allahumma afini fi basari, la ilaha illa Anta.
items.translation: O Allah, grant wellbeing to my body. O Allah, grant wellbeing to my hearing. O Allah, grant wellbeing to my sight. There is no god but You.

items.title: Morning: O Allah, by You we reach the morning
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna wa bika amsayna wa bika nahya wa bika namutu wa ilaykan-nushur.
items.translation: O Allah, by You we reach the morning and the evening, by You we live and die, and to You is the resurrection.

items.title: Morning: Upon the natural way of Islam
items.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ، وَكَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ، وَدِينِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ، وَمِلَّةِ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ حَنِيفًا مُسْلِمًا وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
items.transliteration: Asbahna ala fitratil-Islam, wa kalimatil-ikhlas, wa dini nabiyyina Muhammadin sallallahu alayhi wa sallam, wa millati abina Ibrahima hanifan muslima wa ma kana minal-mushrikin.
items.translation: We have entered the morning upon the natural way of Islam, the word of sincerity, the religion of our Prophet Muhammad, and the way of our father Ibrahim, upright and Muslim, and he was not among the polytheists.

items.title: Praise Who Gave Life
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
items.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur.
items.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after causing us to die, and to Him is the resurrection.

items.title: Waking During the Night
items.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، سُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah... Subhanallah, wal-hamdu lillah, wa la ilaha illallah, wallahu akbar.
items.translation: Said upon waking during the night; whoever then asks Allah, his supplication is answered.

items.title: Bismillahilladhi la yadurru (protection)
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
items.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-Sami'ul-Alim.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, with whose name nothing in the earth or the heaven can cause harm, and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

items.title: Evening Master Remembrance
items.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa ala kulli shayin qadir.
items.translation: We have entered the evening and dominion belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. His is the dominion and praise, and He is over all things competent.

items.title: Evening: O Allah, by You we reach the evening
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma bika amsayna wa bika asbahna wa bika nahya wa bika namutu wa ilaykal-masir.
items.translation: O Allah, by You we reach the evening and the morning, by You we live and die, and to You is the final return.

items.title: Evening: Upon the natural way of Islam
items.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ، وَكَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ، وَدِينِ نَبِيِّنَا مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ، وَمِلَّةِ أَبِينَا إِبْرَاهِيمَ حَنِيفًا مُسْلِمًا وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الْمُشْرِكِينَ
items.transliteration: Amsayna ala fitratil-Islam, wa kalimatil-ikhlas, wa dini nabiyyina Muhammadin sallallahu alayhi wa sallam, wa millati abina Ibrahima hanifan muslima wa ma kana minal-mushrikin.
items.translation: We have entered the evening upon the natural way of Islam, the word of sincerity, the religion of our Prophet Muhammad, and the way of our father Ibrahim, upright and Muslim, and he was not among the polytheists.

items.title: Seek Refuge Perfect Words
items.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
items.transliteration: A'udhu bi-kalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq.
items.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.

items.title: Dua After the Adhan
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هٰذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ، وَالصَّلَاةِ الْقَائِمَةِ، آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ، وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma Rabba hadhihid-da’watit-tammah, was-salatil-qa’imah, ati Muhammadan al-wasilata wal-fadilah, wab’athhu maqaman mahmudan alladhi wa’adtah.
items.translation: O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and established prayer, grant Muhammad the intercession and favour, and raise him to the praised station that You promised him.

items.title: After Fajr and Maghrib: Tahlil (ten times)
items.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, yuhyi wa yumit, wa huwa ala kulli shayin qadir.
items.translation: There is no god but Allah alone, with no partner. His is the dominion and praise; He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things competent.
items.title_ur: فجر و مغرب کے بعد: تہلیل (دس بار)
items.translation_ur: اللہ کے سوا کوئی معبود نہیں، وہ اکیلا ہے، اُس کا کوئی شریک نہیں۔ اُسی کی بادشاہی ہے اور اُسی کے لیے سب تعریف ہے، وہی زندگی دیتا اور موت دیتا ہے، اور وہ ہر چیز پر قادر ہے۔

items.title: After Salah: Seeking Forgiveness
items.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ
items.transliteration: Astaghfirullah, Astaghfirullah, Astaghfirullah.
items.translation: I seek Allah’s forgiveness. I seek Allah’s forgiveness. I seek Allah’s forgiveness.
items.translation_ur: میں اللہ سے بخشش مانگتا ہوں، میں اللہ سے بخشش مانگتا ہوں، میں اللہ سے بخشش مانگتا ہوں۔

items.title: After Salah: None Can Withhold What You Give
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَا مَانِعَ لِمَا أَعْطَيْتَ، وَلَا مُعْطِيَ لِمَا مَنَعْتَ، وَلَا يَنْفَعُ ذَا الْجَدِّ مِنْكَ الْجَدُّ
items.transliteration: Allahumma la mania lima atayt, wa la mutiya lima manat, wa la yanfa’u dhal-jaddi minkal-jadd.
items.translation: O Allah, none can withhold what You give, none can give what You withhold, and no wealth or status benefits against You.
items.title_ur: نماز کے بعد: جو تُو دے اُسے کوئی روک نہیں سکتا
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! جو تُو عطا کرے اُسے کوئی روکنے والا نہیں، اور جو تُو روک لے اُسے کوئی دینے والا نہیں، اور کسی صاحبِ حیثیت کو اُس کی حیثیت تیرے مقابلے میں نفع نہیں دیتی۔

items.title: After Salah: O Allah, You are Peace
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma Antas-Salam wa minkas-salam, tabarakta ya Dhal-Jalali wal-Ikram.
items.translation: O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, Owner of majesty and honor.
items.title_ur: نماز کے بعد: اے اللہ تُو سلامتی ہے
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! تُو ہی سلامتی ہے اور تجھ ہی سے سلامتی ہے۔ تُو بابرکت ہے، اے عظمت اور بزرگی والے۔

items.title: After Salah: Affirmation of Tawhid
items.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, wa huwa ala kulli shayin qadir.
items.translation: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah alone, without partner. His is the kingdom and His is all praise, and He has power over all things.
items.title_ur: نماز کے بعد: توحید کا اقرار
items.translation_ur: اللہ کے سوا کوئی عبادت کے لائق نہیں، وہ اکیلا ہے، اُس کا کوئی شریک نہیں۔ اُسی کی بادشاہی ہے اور اُسی کے لیے سب تعریف ہے، اور وہ ہر چیز پر قادر ہے۔

items.title: After Salah: Tasbih 33, Tahmid 33, Takbir 34
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ ثَلَاثًا وَثَلَاثِينَ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ثَلَاثًا وَثَلَاثِينَ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ أَرْبَعًا وَثَلَاثِينَ
items.transliteration: Subhanallah thirty-three times, Alhamdulillah thirty-three times, Allahu Akbar thirty-four times.
items.translation: Glory be to Allah thirty-three times, praise belongs to Allah thirty-three times, and Allah is the Greatest thirty-four times.
items.title_ur: نماز کے بعد: تسبیح ۳۳، تحمید ۳۳، تکبیر ۳۴
items.translation_ur: سُبْحَان اللہ تینتیس بار، الحمد للہ تینتیس بار، اور اللہ اکبر چونتیس بار۔

items.title: After Salah: Completing One Hundred
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَاللهُ أَكْبَرُ
items.transliteration: Subhanallah (×33), Alhamdulillah (×33), Allahu Akbar (×33).
items.translation: Glory be to Allah, all praise is for Allah, Allah is the Greatest. Completing the hundred with the testimony of Tawheed.
items.title_ur: نماز کے بعد: سو کا پورا کرنا
items.translation_ur: سُبْحَان اللہ، الحمد للہ، اللہ اکبر۔ سو کا عدد کلمۂ توحید سے پورا کیجیے۔

items.title: Ayat al-Kursi before Sleep
items.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
items.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum.
items.translation: Allah, there is no god but Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all.

items.title: Last Two Ayat of al-Baqarah
items.arabic: آمَنَ الرَّسُولُ بِمَا أُنْزِلَ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ رَبِّهِ وَالْمُؤْمِنُونَ
items.transliteration: Amanar-rasulu bima unzila ilayhi mir-rabbihi wal-mu’minun.
items.translation: The Messenger believes in what has been sent down to him from his Lord, and so do the believers.

items.title: Before Sleep: In Your Name I Die and Live
items.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
items.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya.
items.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

items.title: Before Sleep: I Submit Myself to You
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ، وَفَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ، وَأَلْجَأْتُ ظَهْرِي إِلَيْكَ، رَغْبَةً وَرَهْبَةً إِلَيْكَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma aslamtu nafsi ilayk, wa fawwadtu amri ilayk, wa alja'tu zahri ilayk, raghbatan wa rahbatan ilayk.
items.translation: O Allah, I submit myself to You, entrust my affairs to You, and turn my back to You, in hope and fear of You.

items.title: Sleep Protection Words
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ قِنِي عَذَابَكَ يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ عِبَادَكَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma qini adhabaka yawma tabathu ibadak.
items.translation: O Allah, protect me from Your punishment on the Day You resurrect Your servants.
items.source: Sunan Abi Dawud 5045; Jami at-Tirmidhi 3398; Sunan Abi Dawud, at-Tirmidhi

items.title: Sleep Surrender to Allah
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَسْلَمْتُ نَفْسِي إِلَيْكَ، وَفَوَّضْتُ أَمْرِي إِلَيْكَ، وَوَجَّهْتُ وَجْهِي إِلَيْكَ، وَأَلْجَأْتُ ظَهْرِي إِلَيْكَ، رَغْبَةً وَرَهْبَةً إِلَيْكَ، لَا مَلْجَأَ وَلَا مَنْجَا مِنْكَ إِلَّا إِلَيْكَ، آمَنْتُ بِكِتَابِكَ الَّذِي أَنْزَلْتَ، وَبِنَبِيِّكَ الَّذِي أَرْسَلْتَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma aslamtu nafsi ilayk, wa fawwadtu amri ilayk, wa wajjahtu wajhi ilayk, wa alja’tu zahri ilayk, raghbatan wa rahbatan ilayk, la malja’a wa la manja minka illa ilayk, amantu bikitabikalladhi anzalt, wa binabiyyikalladhi arsalt.
items.translation: O Allah, I submit myself to You, entrust my affairs to You, turn my face to You, and rely upon You, hoping in You and fearing You. There is no refuge and no escape from You except to You. I believe in Your Book that You revealed and Your Prophet whom You sent.

items.title: Standing after Ruku: Rabbana wa lakal-hamd
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ
items.transliteration: Rabbana wa lakal-hamd.
items.translation: Our Lord, and to You belongs all praise.

items.title: Beloved Words
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
items.transliteration: Subhanallahi walhamdulillah.
items.translation: Glory be to Allah and all praise is for Allah.

items.title: The Four Beloved Words
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ
items.transliteration: Subhanallah, walhamdulillah, wa la ilaha illallah, wallahu Akbar.
items.translation: Glory be to Allah, praise be to Allah, none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, and Allah is greatest.

items.title: In Ruku: Subhana Rabbiyal-Azim
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْعَظِيمِ
items.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-Azim.
items.translation: Glory be to my Lord, the Magnificent.

items.title: In Sujud: Subhana Rabbiyal-Ala
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّيَ الْأَعْلَىٰ
items.transliteration: Subhana Rabbiyal-A’la.
items.translation: Glory be to my Lord, the Most High.

items.title: Laylatul Qadr: O Allah, You are Pardoning
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
items.transliteration: Allahumma innaka ‘afuwwun tuhibbul-‘afwa fa‘fu ‘anni.
items.translation: O Allah, You are Pardoning and love pardon, so pardon me.

items.title: Rising from Ruku: Sami Allahu liman hamidah
items.arabic: سَمِعَ اللهُ لِمَنْ حَمِدَهُ
items.transliteration: Sami’a Allahu liman hamidah.
items.translation: Allah hears whoever praises Him.

items.title: SubhanAllah al-Azim wa Bihamdih
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللهِ الْعَظِيمِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ
items.transliteration: Subhana Allahi al-Azimi wa bihamdih.
items.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Magnificent, and praise is His.

items.title: Subhanallahi wa Bihamdihi Subhanallahil Azim
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
items.transliteration: Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi, Subhanallahil-Azim.
items.translation: Glory be to Allah and praise is His; glory be to Allah, the Magnificent.

items.title: Surah al-Fatihah
items.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ، الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ، مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ، إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ، اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ، صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ
items.transliteration: Alhamdu lillahi Rabbil-‘alamin. Ar-Rahmanir-Rahim. Maliki yawmid-din. Iyyaka na‘budu wa iyyaka nasta‘in. Ihdinas-siratal-mustaqim. Siratal-ladhina an‘amta ‘alayhim ghayril-maghdubi ‘alayhim wa lad-dallin.
items.translation: All praise is for Allah, Lord of all worlds, the Most Merciful, the Especially Merciful, Master of the Day of Judgment. You alone we worship and You alone we ask for help. Guide us to the straight path, the path of those You have blessed, not those who incurred anger nor those who went astray.

items.title: Ayat al-Kursi
items.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ، لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ، لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ، مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ، يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ، وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ، وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ، وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا، وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
items.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum. La ta’khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm. Lahu ma fis-samawati wa ma fil-ard. Man dhal-ladhi yashfa’u ‘indahu illa bi-idhnih. Ya‘lamu ma bayna aydihim wa ma khalfahum. Wa la yuhituna bishay’in min ‘ilmihi illa bima sha’. Wasi‘a kursiyyuhus-samawati wal-ard. Wa la ya’uduhu hifzuhuma, wa Huwal-‘Aliyyul-‘Azim.
items.translation: Allah, there is no god but Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer. Neither drowsiness nor sleep overtakes Him. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and the earth. None can intercede with Him except by His permission. He knows what is before them and behind them, and they encompass nothing of His knowledge except what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and preserving them does not tire Him. He is the Most High, the Magnificent.

items.title: Hasbiyallahu (sufficiency in Allah)
items.arabic: حَسْبِيَ اللهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
items.transliteration: Hasbiyallahu la ilaha illa huwa alayhi tawakkaltu wa huwa Rabbul-Arshil-Azim.
items.translation: Allah is sufficient for me. There is no god but He. In Him I place my trust, and He is Lord of the Mighty Throne.

items.title: Surah al-Ikhlas
items.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ، اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ، لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ، وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
items.transliteration: Qul Huwallahu Ahad. Allahus-Samad. Lam yalid wa lam yulad. Wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad.
items.translation: Say: He is Allah, One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is born, and there is none comparable to Him.

items.title: Surah al-Falaq
items.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ، مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
items.transliteration: Qul a‘udhu bi Rabbil-falaq. Min sharri ma khalaq. Wa min sharri ghasiqin idha waqab. Wa min sharrin-naffathati fil-‘uqad. Wa min sharri hasidin idha hasad.
items.translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak from the evil of what He created, from the evil of darkness when it settles, from the evil of those who blow on knots, and from the evil of an envier when he envies.

items.title: Surah an-Nas
items.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ، مَلِكِ النَّاسِ، إِلَهِ النَّاسِ، مِنْ شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ، الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ، مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
items.transliteration: Qul a‘udhu bi Rabbin-nas. Malikin-nas. Ilahin-nas. Min sharril-waswasil-khannas. Alladhi yuwaswisu fi sudurin-nas. Minal-jinnati wan-nas.
items.translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the King of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the retreating whisperer who whispers into the hearts of mankind, from among jinn and mankind.

items.title: Against Bad Character
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ مُنْكَرَاتِ الْأَخْلَاقِ وَالْأَعْمَالِ وَالْأَهْوَاءِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni a’udhu bika min munkaratil-akhlaqi wal-a’mali wal-ahwa.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from evil character, evil deeds, and evil desires.

items.title: For Jannah and Refuge from Fire
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni as’alukal-jannah, wa a’udhu bika minan-nar.
items.translation: O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and seek refuge in You from the Fire.
items.source: Sunan Abi Dawud 792; Sunan Ibn Majah 910

items.title: For Protection from Hellfire
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَجِرْنِي مِنَ النَّارِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma ajirni minan-nar.
items.translation: O Allah, save me from the Fire.

items.title: La Hawla wa La Quwwata
items.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
items.transliteration: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah.
items.translation: There is no power and no strength except with Allah.

items.title: Prophetic Ruqyah
items.arabic: بِاسْمِ اللهِ أَرْقِيكَ، مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ يُؤْذِيكَ، مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ نَفْسٍ أَوْ عَيْنِ حَاسِدٍ، اللهُ يَشْفِيكَ، بِاسْمِ اللهِ أَرْقِيكَ
items.transliteration: Bismillahi arqik, min kulli shay’in yu’dhik, min sharri kulli nafsin aw ‘ayni hasid, Allahu yashfik, bismillahi arqik.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, I perform ruqyah for you from everything that harms you, from the evil of every soul or envious eye. May Allah heal you. In the name of Allah, I perform ruqyah for you.

items.title: Ruqyah for Pain
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ ثَلَاثًا، أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ
items.transliteration: Bismillah three times. A’udhu billahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhadhir.
items.translation: In the name of Allah three times. I seek refuge in Allah and His power from the evil of what I feel and fear.

items.title: Admission of Wrongdoing
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbana zalamna anfusana wa il lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakunanna minal-khasirin.
items.translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves; if You do not forgive us and have mercy on us, we will surely be among the losers.

items.title: Forgive and Have Mercy
items.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbighfir warham wa Anta khayrur-rahimin.
items.translation: My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of those who show mercy.

items.title: Forgiveness for the Believing Men and Women
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ وَالْمُسْلِمِينَ وَالْمُسْلِمَاتِ
items.transliteration: Allahummaghfir lil-mu’minina wal-mu’minat wal-muslimina wal-muslimat.
items.translation: O Allah, forgive the believing men and women and the Muslim men and women.

items.title: Astaghfirullah
items.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ
items.transliteration: Astaghfirullah.
items.translation: I seek Allah’s forgiveness.

items.title: Dua between the Two Prostrations
items.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي، رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
items.transliteration: Rabbi-ghfir li, Rabbi-ghfir li.
items.translation: My Lord, forgive me. My Lord, forgive me.
items.source: Sunan Abi Dawud 874; Sunan Ibn Majah 897

items.title: Forgive All My Sins — Small and Great
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ، دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ، وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ، وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
items.transliteration: Allahummaghfir li dhanbi kullah, diqqahu wa jillah, wa awwalahu wa akhirah, wa alaniyatahu wa sirrah.
items.translation: O Allah, forgive me all my sins, the small and the great, the first and the last, the open and the hidden.

items.title: Forgive My Mistakes and Ignorance
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي خَطِيئَتِي وَجَهْلِي وَإِسْرَافِي فِي أَمْرِي وَمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ مِنِّي
items.transliteration: Allahummaghfir li khati’ati wa jahli wa israfi fi amri wa ma Anta alamu bihi minni.
items.translation: O Allah, forgive my mistakes, my ignorance, my excess in my affairs, and what You know better than me.

items.title: Forgive Past and Future Sins
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا قَدَّمْتُ وَمَا أَخَّرْتُ وَمَا أَسْرَرْتُ وَمَا أَعْلَنْتُ
items.transliteration: Allahummaghfir li ma qaddamtu wa ma akhkhartu wa ma asrartu wa ma alantu.
items.translation: O Allah, forgive what I have sent ahead, what I have delayed, what I concealed, and what I made public.

items.title: Istighfar of the Ever-Living (forgiveness of major sins)
items.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيَّ الْقَيُّومَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
items.transliteration: Astaghfirullahal-Azim alladhi la ilaha illa huwal-Hayyal-Qayyuma wa atubu ilayh.
items.translation: I seek the forgiveness of Allah the Mighty, besides whom there is no god, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer, and I turn to Him in repentance.

items.title: No One Forgives Except You
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي ظُلْمًا كَثِيرًا وَلَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَغْفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ وَارْحَمْنِي إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni zalamtu nafsi zulman kathiran wa la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta, faghfir li maghfiratan min indika warhamni innaka Antal-Ghafurur-Rahim.
items.translation: O Allah, I have greatly wronged myself, and none forgives sins except You. Grant me forgiveness from Yourself and have mercy on me. Indeed, You are the Most Forgiving, the Most Merciful.

items.title: Rabbighfir Li wa Tub Alayya
items.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الرَّحِيمُ
items.transliteration: Rabbi-ghfir li wa tub alayya, innaka Anta at-Tawwabur-Rahim.
items.translation: My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance. Indeed, You are the Accepting of repentance, the Most Merciful.

items.title: Sayyidul Istighfar
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَىٰ عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ لَكَ بِذَنْبِي، فَاغْفِرْ لِي، فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa Anta, khalaqtani wa ana abduka, wa ana ala ahdika wa wadika ma istata’tu, a’udhu bika min sharri ma sana’tu, abu’u laka bini’matika alayya, wa abu’u laka bidhanbi, faghfir li, fa innahu la yaghfiru adh-dhunuba illa Anta.
items.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord. None has the right to be worshipped except You. You created me and I am Your servant. I remain upon Your covenant and promise as much as I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your favour upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for none forgives sins except You.

items.title: Seeking Forgiveness and Repentance
items.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
items.transliteration: Astaghfirullaha wa atubu ilayh.
items.translation: I seek Allah’s forgiveness and repent to Him.

items.title: Complete Salawat Formula
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَبَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma salli ala Muhammadin abdika wa rasulika kama sallayta ala ali Ibrahim, wa barik ala Muhammadin wa ala ali Muhammad kama barakta ala Ibrahim.
items.translation: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad, Your servant and messenger, as You sent prayers upon the family of Ibrahim, and bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad as You blessed Ibrahim.

items.title: Concise Salawat
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَىٰ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
items.transliteration: Allahumma salli ala Muhammad wa ala ali Muhammad.
items.translation: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and upon the family of Muhammad.
items.source: From the salawat of Sahih al-Bukhari 3370; Sahih Muslim 406

items.title: Salat Ibrahimiyyah
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ، اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَعَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
items.transliteration: Allahumma salli ‘ala Muhammad wa ‘ala ali Muhammad, kama sallayta ‘ala Ibrahim wa ‘ala ali Ibrahim, innaka Hamidun Majid. Allahumma barik ‘ala Muhammad wa ‘ala ali Muhammad, kama barakta ‘ala Ibrahim wa ‘ala ali Ibrahim, innaka Hamidun Majid.
items.translation: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad as You sent prayers upon Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim. You are Praiseworthy and Glorious. O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad as You blessed Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim. You are Praiseworthy and Glorious.

items.title: Salawat upon Muhammad and His Wives
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَزْوَاجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ، كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، وَبَارِكْ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَزْوَاجِهِ وَذُرِّيَّتِهِ، كَمَا بَارَكْتَ عَلَى آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ، إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
items.transliteration: Allahumma salli ala Muhammadin wa azwajihi wa dhurriyyatihi kama sallayta ala ali Ibrahim, wa barik ala Muhammadin wa azwajihi wa dhurriyyatihi kama barakta ala ali Ibrahim, innaka Hamidun Majid.
items.translation: O Allah, send prayers upon Muhammad, his wives, and his descendants as You sent prayers upon the family of Ibrahim; and bless Muhammad, his wives, and his descendants as You blessed the family of Ibrahim. Indeed, You are Praiseworthy and Glorious.

items.title: First Kalima Tayyibah
items.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu Muhammadur rasulullah.
items.translation: There is no deity except Allah, Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.

items.title: Fifth Kalima Istighfar
items.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللّٰهَ رَبِّي مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ أَذْنَبْتُهُ عَمْدًا أَوْ خَطَأً، سِرًّا أَوْ عَلَانِيَةً، وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنَ الذَّنْبِ الَّذِي أَعْلَمُ وَمِنَ الذَّنْبِ الَّذِي لَا أَعْلَمُ، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ عَلَّامُ الْغُيُوبِ وَسَتَّارُ الْعُيُوبِ وَغَفَّارُ الذُّنُوبِ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللّٰهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ
items.transliteration: Astaghfirullaha rabbi min kulli dhanbin adhnabtuhu amdan aw khata-an, sirran aw alaniyah, wa atubu ilayhi minadh-dhanbilladhi alamu wa minadh-dhanbilladhi la alamu, innaka anta allamul-ghuyubi wa sattarul-uyubi wa ghaffarudh-dhunub, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahil aliyil azim.
items.translation: I seek forgiveness from Allah, my Lord, for every sin committed knowingly or mistakenly, secretly or openly, and I turn to Him from the sin known to me and the sin unknown to me. Surely You are the Knower of the unseen, the Concealer of faults, and the Forgiver of sins. There is no power nor strength except with Allah, the Most High, the Magnificent.
items.source: Traditional Kalima (subcontinental teaching set); not traced to a single hadith narration

items.title: Fourth Kalima Tawheed
items.arabic: لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ، وَهُوَ حَيٌّ لَا يَمُوتُ أَبَدًا أَبَدًا، ذُو الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ، بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ، وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lahu, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, yuhyi wa yumit, wa huwa hayyun la yamutu abadan abada, dhul-jalali wal-ikram, biyadihil-khayr, wa huwa ala kulli shay-in qadir.
items.translation: There is no deity except Allah alone, without partner. To Him belongs the dominion and to Him belongs all praise. He gives life and causes death, and He is Ever-Living and never dies. Owner of Majesty and Honor, in His Hand is all good, and He has power over all things.
items.source: Sahih al-Bukhari 3293; Sahih Muslim 2691; traditional Kalima teaching

items.title: Second Kalima Shahadah
items.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
items.transliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lahu, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan abduhu wa rasuluh.
items.translation: I bear witness that there is no deity except Allah alone, without any partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.

items.title: Sixth Kalima Radd-e-Kufr
items.arabic: اللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ أَنْ أُشْرِكَ بِكَ شَيْئًا وَأَنَا أَعْلَمُ بِهِ، وَأَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا لَا أَعْلَمُ بِهِ، تُبْتُ عَنْهُ وَتَبَرَّأْتُ مِنَ الْكُفْرِ وَالشِّرْكِ وَالْكِذْبِ وَالْغِيبَةِ وَالْبِدْعَةِ وَالنَّمِيمَةِ وَالْفَوَاحِشِ وَالْبُهْتَانِ وَالْمَعَاصِي كُلِّهَا، وَأَسْلَمْتُ وَأَقُولُ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللّٰهِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni a udhu bika min an ushrika bika shay-an wa ana alamu bih, wa astaghfiruka lima la alamu bih, tubtu anhu wa tabarra-tu minal-kufri wash-shirki wal-kidhbi wal-ghibati wal-bidati wan-namimati wal-fawahishi wal-buhtani wal-maasi kulliha, wa aslamtu wa aqulu la ilaha illallahu Muhammadur rasulullah.
items.translation: O Allah, refuge is sought in You from knowingly associating anything with You, and forgiveness is sought from You for what is not known. Repentance is made from it, and disavowal is made from disbelief, shirk, lying, backbiting, innovation, tale-bearing, indecency, slander, and all sins. Submission is made, and the declaration is: there is no deity except Allah, Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah.
items.source: Core wording from Musnad Ahmad 19606; full text is a traditional compilation

items.title: Third Kalima Tamjeed
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللّٰهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلّٰهِ، وَلَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ، وَاللّٰهُ أَكْبَرُ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللّٰهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ
items.transliteration: Subhanallahi walhamdulillahi wa la ilaha illallahu wallahu akbar, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahil aliyil azim.
items.translation: Glory be to Allah, all praise is for Allah, there is no deity except Allah, Allah is the Greatest, and there is no power nor strength except with Allah, the Most High, the Magnificent.
items.source: Sahih Muslim 2695; Sahih al-Bukhari 6384; traditional Kalima teaching

items.title: Quranic Command to Send Salawat
items.arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
items.transliteration: Innallaha wa mala’ikatahu yusalluna ‘alan-Nabiyy. Ya ayyuhalladhina amanu sallu ‘alayhi wa sallimu taslima.
items.translation: Indeed, Allah and His angels send blessings upon the Prophet. O you who believe, send blessings upon him and greet him with worthy greetings of peace.

items.title: Opening Supplication (Subhanaka)
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، وَتَبَارَكَ اسْمُكَ، وَتَعَالَى جَدُّكَ، وَلَا إِلَٰهَ غَيْرُكَ
items.transliteration: Subhanaka Allahumma wa bihamdika, wa tabarakasmuka, wa ta’ala jadduka, wa la ilaha ghayruk.
items.translation: Glory be to You, O Allah, and praise be to You. Blessed is Your name and exalted is Your majesty, and there is no god besides You.
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! تُو پاک ہے اور تیری ہی تعریف ہے، تیرا نام بابرکت ہے، تیری شان بلند ہے، اور تیرے سوا کوئی معبود نہیں۔

items.title: After Wudu
items.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ، اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي مِنَ التَّوَّابِينَ وَاجْعَلْنِي مِنَ الْمُتَطَهِّرِينَ
items.transliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan abduhu wa rasuluh. Allahumma-j’alni minat-tawwabin waj’alni minal-mutatahhirin.
items.translation: I bear witness that there is no god but Allah alone, with no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger. O Allah, make me of those who repent and make me of those who purify themselves.
items.translation_ur: میں گواہی دیتا ہوں کہ اللہ کے سوا کوئی معبود نہیں، وہ اکیلا ہے، اُس کا کوئی شریک نہیں، اور میں گواہی دیتا ہوں کہ محمد ﷺ اُس کے بندے اور رسول ہیں۔ اے اللہ! مجھے توبہ کرنے والوں میں اور پاک رہنے والوں میں شامل فرما۔

items.title: Expiation of the Gathering
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ وَبِحَمْدِكَ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْكَ
items.transliteration: Subhanaka Allahumma wa bihamdika, ashhadu an la ilaha illa anta, astaghfiruka wa atubu ilayk.
items.translation: Glory be to You, O Allah, and praise be to You. I bear witness that there is no god but You. I seek Your forgiveness and I repent to You.
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! تُو پاک ہے اور تیری ہی تعریف ہے، میں گواہی دیتا ہوں کہ تیرے سوا کوئی معبود نہیں، میں تجھ سے بخشش مانگتا ہوں اور تیری طرف توبہ کرتا ہوں۔

items.title: Breaking the Fast
items.arabic: ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ، وَابْتَلَّتِ الْعُرُوقُ، وَثَبَتَ الْأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
items.transliteration: Dhahaba-z-zama’u, wabtallatil-‘uruqu, wa thabatal-ajru in sha’Allah.
items.translation: The thirst is gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.
items.translation_ur: پیاس جاتی رہی، رگیں تر ہو گئیں، اور ان شاء اللہ اجر ثابت ہو گیا۔

items.title: Supplication for the Host
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَطْعِمْ مَنْ أَطْعَمَنِي، وَاسْقِ مَنْ سَقَانِي
items.transliteration: Allahumma at’im man at’amani, wasqi man saqani.
items.translation: O Allah, feed the one who fed me, and give drink to the one who gave me drink.
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! جس نے مجھے کھلایا اُسے کھلا، اور جس نے مجھے پلایا اُسے پلا۔

items.title: Tashahhud (At-Tahiyyat)
items.arabic: التَّحِيَّاتُ لِلَّهِ وَالصَّلَوَاتُ وَالطَّيِّبَاتُ، السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكَ أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ وَرَحْمَةُ اللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ، السَّلَامُ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ عِبَادِ اللَّهِ الصَّالِحِينَ، أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
items.transliteration: At-tahiyyatu lillahi was-salawatu wat-tayyibat, as-salamu ‘alayka ayyuhan-Nabiyyu wa rahmatullahi wa barakatuh, as-salamu ‘alayna wa ‘ala ‘ibadillahis-salihin, ashhadu an la ilaha illallah wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan ‘abduhu wa rasuluh.
items.translation: All greetings, prayers and good things are for Allah. Peace be upon you, O Prophet, and the mercy of Allah and His blessings. Peace be upon us and upon the righteous servants of Allah. I bear witness that there is no god but Allah, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His servant and Messenger.
items.translation_ur: تمام آداب و تعظیم، نمازیں اور پاکیزہ چیزیں اللہ کے لیے ہیں۔ اے نبی! آپ پر سلامتی ہو اور اللہ کی رحمت اور اُس کی برکتیں۔ ہم پر اور اللہ کے نیک بندوں پر سلامتی ہو۔ میں گواہی دیتا ہوں کہ اللہ کے سوا کوئی معبود نہیں، اور میں گواہی دیتا ہوں کہ محمد ﷺ اُس کے بندے اور رسول ہیں۔

items.title: Turning Over During the Night
items.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْوَاحِدُ الْقَهَّارُ، رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا الْعَزِيزُ الْغَفَّارُ
items.transliteration: La ilaha illallahul-Wahidul-Qahhar, Rabbus-samawati wal-ardi wa ma baynahumal-‘Azizul-Ghaffar.
items.translation: There is no god but Allah, the One, the Subduer, Lord of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them, the Almighty, the Ever-Forgiving.
items.translation_ur: اللہ کے سوا کوئی معبود نہیں، وہ یکتا، سب پر غالب ہے، آسمانوں اور زمین اور جو کچھ اُن کے درمیان ہے سب کا رب، نہایت زبردست، بہت بخشنے والا۔

items.title: Seeking Refuge from a Bad Dream
items.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ غَضَبِهِ وَعِقَابِهِ، وَشَرِّ عِبَادِهِ، وَمِنْ هَمَزَاتِ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَأَنْ يَحْضُرُونِ
items.transliteration: A‘udhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min ghadabihi wa ‘iqabihi, wa sharri ‘ibadihi, wa min hamazatish-shayatini wa an yahdurun.
items.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from His anger and His punishment, from the evil of His servants, and from the incitements of the devils and their presence.
items.translation_ur: میں اللہ کے کامل کلمات کے ذریعے اُس کے غضب اور اُس کے عذاب سے، اور اُس کے بندوں کے شر سے، اور شیطانوں کے وسوسوں اور اُن کے حاضر ہونے سے پناہ مانگتا ہوں۔

items.title: Seeing the New Moon
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْأَمْنِ وَالْإِيمَانِ، وَالسَّلَامَةِ وَالْإِسْلَامِ، رَبِّي وَرَبُّكَ اللَّهُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma ahillahu ‘alayna bil-amni wal-iman, was-salamati wal-islam, Rabbi wa Rabbukallah.
items.translation: O Allah, bring it (this new moon) over us with security and faith, with safety and Islam. My Lord and your Lord is Allah.
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! اِس چاند کو ہم پر امن و ایمان، اور سلامتی و اسلام کے ساتھ طلوع فرما۔ میرا رب اور تیرا رب اللہ ہے۔

items.title: When Fearing a People
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَجْعَلُكَ فِي نُحُورِهِمْ، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شُرُورِهِمْ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inna naj‘aluka fi nuhurihim, wa na‘udhu bika min shururihim.
items.translation: O Allah, we place You before them, and we seek refuge in You from their evil.
items.title_ur: کسی قوم کے خوف کے وقت
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! ہم تجھے اُن کے مقابلے میں کرتے ہیں، اور اُن کے شر سے تیری پناہ مانگتے ہیں۔

items.title: After Drinking Milk
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَزِدْنَا مِنْهُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana fihi wa zidna minhu.
items.translation: O Allah, bless it for us and give us more of it.
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! ہمارے لیے اِس میں برکت دے اور ہمیں اِس سے زیادہ عطا فرما۔

items.title: Thanking One Who Does Good
items.arabic: جَزَاكَ اللَّهُ خَيْرًا
items.transliteration: Jazakallahu khayran.
items.translation: May Allah reward you with good — said to thank one who does you a kindness.
items.title_ur: کسی کے احسان کے بدلے دعا
items.translation_ur: اللہ تمہیں بہترین جزا دے — کسی کی بھلائی یا احسان کے بدلے کہی جانے والی دعا۔

items.title: After an Unfortunate Event
items.arabic: قَدَرُ اللَّهِ وَمَا شَاءَ فَعَلَ
items.transliteration: Qadarullahi wa ma sha’a fa’al.
items.translation: It is the decree of Allah, and He does what He wills. (Said instead of dwelling on “if only…” after something goes wrong.)
