items.translation_ur: یہ اللہ کا مقدر تھا، اور اُس نے جو چاہا کیا۔ (کسی نقصان کے بعد ’کاش‘ کہنے کے بجائے یہ کہیں۔)

items.title: Seeking Refuge from Shirk
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ أَنْ أُشْرِكَ بِكَ وَأَنَا أَعْلَمُ، وَأَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا لَا أَعْلَمُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni a‘udhu bika an ushrika bika wa ana a‘lam, wa astaghfiruka lima la a‘lam.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from knowingly associating anything with You, and I seek Your forgiveness for what I do not know.
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! میں اِس سے تیری پناہ مانگتا ہوں کہ جانتے بوجھتے تیرے ساتھ کسی کو شریک ٹھہراؤں، اور جو مجھے معلوم نہیں اُس کے لیے تجھ سے بخشش مانگتا ہوں۔

items.title: Reply to ‘I Love You for Allah’s Sake’
items.arabic: أَحَبَّكَ الَّذِي أَحْبَبْتَنِي لَهُ
items.transliteration: Ahabbakalladhi ahbabtani lah.
items.translation: May He for whose sake you love me, love you. (Reply when someone says: I love you for the sake of Allah.)
items.title_ur: ‘میں اللہ کے لیے تم سے محبت کرتا ہوں’ کا جواب
items.translation_ur: جس کی خاطر تم نے مجھ سے محبت کی، وہ تم سے محبت کرے۔ (جب کوئی کہے: میں اللہ کے لیے تم سے محبت کرتا ہوں۔)

items.title: Seeing the First Fruit of the Season
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِي ثَمَرِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي مَدِينَتِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي صَاعِنَا، وَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي مُدِّنَا
items.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana fi thamarina, wa barik lana fi madinatina, wa barik lana fi sa‘ina, wa barik lana fi muddina.
items.translation: O Allah, bless us in our fruit, bless us in our city, bless us in our sa‘, and bless us in our mudd.
items.title_ur: موسم کا پہلا پھل دیکھتے وقت
items.translation_ur: اے اللہ! ہمارے پھل میں برکت دے، ہمارے شہر میں برکت دے، ہمارے صاع میں برکت دے، اور ہمارے مُد میں برکت دے۔

items.title: Complete Dua for Travel
items.arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ، وَإِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَٰذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَى، وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَى، اللَّهُمَّ هَوِّنْ عَلَيْنَا سَفَرَنَا هَٰذَا وَاطْوِ عَنَّا بُعْدَهُ، اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الصَّاحِبُ فِي السَّفَرِ، وَالْخَلِيفَةُ فِي الْأَهْلِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ وَعْثَاءِ السَّفَرِ، وَكَآبَةِ الْمَنْظَرِ، وَسُوءِ الْمُنْقَلَبِ فِي الْمَالِ وَالْأَهْلِ
items.transliteration: Allahu akbar, Allahu akbar, Allahu akbar. Subhanalladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrinin, wa inna ila Rabbina lamunqalibun. Allahumma inna nas'aluka fi safarina hadhal-birra wat-taqwa, wa minal-'amali ma tarda. Allahumma hawwin 'alayna safarana hadha watwi 'anna bu'dah. Allahumma Antas-sahibu fis-safari wal-khalifatu fil-ahl. Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min wa'tha'is-safari, wa ka'abatil-manzari, wa su'il-munqalabi fil-mali wal-ahl.
items.translation: Allah is greatest. Glory be to the One who subjected this to service, and return is to the Lord. O Allah, righteousness, piety, and pleasing deeds are sought on this journey. O Allah, make this journey easy and shorten its distance. O Allah, be the companion on the journey and guardian over the family. Protection is sought from travel hardship, distressing sights, and bad return regarding wealth and family.

items.title: Pardon, Forgiveness, Mercy, and Victory
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِنْ نَسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا رَبَّنَا وَلَا تَحْمِلْ عَلَيْنَا إِصْرًا كَمَا حَمَلْتَهُ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِنْ قَبْلِنَا رَبَّنَا وَلَا تُحَمِّلْنَا مَا لَا طَاقَةَ لَنَا بِهِ وَاعْفُ عَنَّا وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَارْحَمْنَا أَنْتَ مَوْلَانَا فَانْصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ
items.transliteration: Rabbana la tu'akhidhna in nasina aw akhta'na. Rabbana wa la tahmil 'alayna isran kama hamaltahu 'alalladhina min qablina. Rabbana wa la tuhammilna ma la taqata lana bih. Wa'fu 'anna, waghfir lana, warhamna. Anta mawlana fansurna 'alal-qawmil-kafirin.
items.translation: Our Lord, do not take to account forgetfulness or mistakes. Our Lord, do not place a burden like that placed on those before. Our Lord, do not burden beyond ability. Pardon, forgive, and have mercy. You are the Protector, so grant victory over the disbelieving people.

items.title: Ayat al-Kursi (after salah)
items.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
items.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa Huwal-Hayyul-Qayyum.
items.translation: Allah, there is no god but Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all. Recited after every obligatory prayer.

items.title: Surah al-Ikhlas
items.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ، اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ، لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ، وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
items.transliteration: Qul Huwallahu Ahad. Allahus-Samad. Lam yalid wa lam yulad. Wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad.
items.translation: Say: He is Allah, One. Allah, the Eternal Refuge. He neither begets nor is born, and there is none comparable to Him. Recited after prayers, especially after Fajr and Maghrib.

items.title: Surah al-Falaq
items.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ، مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ، وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
items.transliteration: Qul a‘udhu bi Rabbil-falaq. Min sharri ma khalaq. Wa min sharri ghasiqin idha waqab. Wa min sharrin-naffathati fil-‘uqad. Wa min sharri hasidin idha hasad.
items.translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak from the evil of what He created, from the evil of darkness when it settles, from the evil of those who blow on knots, and from the evil of an envier when he envies. Recited after prayers, especially after Fajr and Maghrib.

items.title: Before Wudu
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ
items.transliteration: Bismillah.
items.translation: In the name of Allah. (Said before beginning wudu.)

items.title: Entering the Masjid (with Salawat)
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ، وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللهِ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذُنُوبِي، وَافْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
items.transliteration: Bismillah, was-salamu ‘ala Rasulillah. Allahummaghfir li dhunubi, waftah li abwaba rahmatik.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, and peace be upon the Messenger of Allah. O Allah, forgive my sins and open for me the gates of Your mercy. (On entering the masjid.)

items.title: Salawat After the Adhan
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ
items.transliteration: Allahumma salli ‘ala Muhammad.
items.translation: O Allah, send blessings upon Muhammad. (Said after the adhan, before the dua.)

items.title: Takbir al-Ihram
items.arabic: اللهُ أَكْبَرُ
items.transliteration: Allahu Akbar.
items.translation: Allah is the Greatest. (Opening the prayer.)

items.title: Opening Supplication (Distance My Sins)
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَاعِدْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا بَاعَدْتَ بَيْنَ الْمَشْرِقِ وَالْمَغْرِبِ، اللَّهُمَّ نَقِّنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ كَمَا يُنَقَّى الثَّوْبُ الْأَبْيَضُ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْسِلْنِي مِنْ خَطَايَايَ بِالْمَاءِ وَالثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ
items.transliteration: Allahumma ba‘id bayni wa bayna khatayaya kama ba‘adta baynal-mashriqi wal-maghrib. Allahumma naqqini min khatayaya kama yunaqqath-thawbul-abyadu minad-danas. Allahummaghsilni min khatayaya bil-ma’i wath-thalji wal-barad.
items.translation: O Allah, distance me from my sins as You have distanced the east from the west. O Allah, cleanse me of my sins as a white garment is cleansed of filth. O Allah, wash away my sins with water, snow, and hail. (Opening supplication after takbir.)

items.title: Opening Praise (Allahu Akbaru Kabira)
items.arabic: اللهُ أَكْبَرُ كَبِيرًا، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا، وَسُبْحَانَ اللهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
items.transliteration: Allahu Akbaru kabira, walhamdu lillahi kathira, wa subhanallahi bukratan wa asila.
items.translation: Allah is the Greatest, abundantly; all praise be to Allah, plentifully; and glory be to Allah morning and evening. (Opening of the prayer.)

items.title: Opening Supplication for Night Prayer
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ جِبْرِيلَ وَمِيكَائِيلَ وَإِسْرَافِيلَ، فَاطِرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ، عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ، أَنْتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ فِيمَا كَانُوا فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ، اهْدِنِي لِمَا اخْتُلِفَ فِيهِ مِنَ الْحَقِّ بِإِذْنِكَ، إِنَّكَ تَهْدِي مَنْ تَشَاءُ إِلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ
items.transliteration: Allahumma Rabba Jibrila wa Mika’ila wa Israfil, fatiras-samawati wal-ard, ‘alimal-ghaybi wash-shahadah, Anta tahkumu bayna ‘ibadika fima kanu fihi yakhtalifun. Ihdini limakhtulifa fihi minal-haqqi bi-idhnik, innaka tahdi man tasha’u ila siratin mustaqim.
items.translation: O Allah, Lord of Jibril, Mika’il and Israfil, Originator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the seen: You judge between Your servants in what they differ. Guide me by Your leave to the truth in what is disputed; indeed You guide whom You will to a straight path. (Opening of the night prayer.)

items.title: Seeking Refuge before Recitation
items.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
items.transliteration: A‘udhu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajim.
items.translation: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan. (Before reciting the Qur’an.)

items.title: Basmalah
items.arabic: بِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
items.transliteration: Bismillahir-Rahmanir-Rahim.
items.translation: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. (Before al-Fatihah.)

items.title: In Ruku and Sujud: Subbuhun Quddusun
items.arabic: سُبُّوحٌ قُدُّوسٌ، رَبُّ الْمَلَائِكَةِ وَالرُّوحِ
items.transliteration: Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabbul-mala’ikati war-ruh.
items.translation: Perfect in glory, perfect in holiness, Lord of the angels and the Spirit. (In rukuʿ and sujud.)

items.title: In Ruku and Sujud: Subhanaka Allahumma
items.arabic: سُبْحَانَكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا وَبِحَمْدِكَ، اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي
items.transliteration: Subhanaka Allahumma Rabbana wa bihamdika, Allahummaghfir li.
items.translation: Glory be to You, O Allah our Lord, and praise be to You; O Allah, forgive me. (In rukuʿ and sujud.)

items.title: Extended Praise after Ruku
items.arabic: رَبَّنَا وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ، حَمْدًا كَثِيرًا طَيِّبًا مُبَارَكًا فِيهِ
items.transliteration: Rabbana wa lakal-hamd, hamdan kathiran tayyiban mubarakan fih.
items.translation: Our Lord, to You belongs all praise — abundant, good, and blessed. (Standing after rukuʿ.)

items.title: In Sujud: To You I Prostrate
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ سَجَدْتُ، وَبِكَ آمَنْتُ، وَلَكَ أَسْلَمْتُ، سَجَدَ وَجْهِيَ لِلَّذِي خَلَقَهُ وَصَوَّرَهُ وَشَقَّ سَمْعَهُ وَبَصَرَهُ، تَبَارَكَ اللهُ أَحْسَنُ الْخَالِقِينَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma laka sajadtu, wa bika amantu, wa laka aslamtu. Sajada wajhiya lilladhi khalaqahu wa sawwarahu wa shaqqa sam‘ahu wa basarah, tabarakallahu ahsanul-khaliqin.
items.translation: O Allah, to You I prostrate, in You I believe, to You I submit. My face has prostrated to the One who created it, shaped it, and gave it hearing and sight. Blessed is Allah, the best of creators. (In sujud.)

items.title: In Sujud: Forgive All My Sins
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي ذَنْبِي كُلَّهُ، دِقَّهُ وَجِلَّهُ، وَأَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ، وَعَلَانِيَتَهُ وَسِرَّهُ
items.transliteration: Allahummaghfir li dhanbi kullahu, diqqahu wa jillahu, wa awwalahu wa akhirahu, wa ‘alaniyatahu wa sirrah.
items.translation: O Allah, forgive me all my sins — the small and the great, the first and the last, the open and the secret. (In sujud.)

items.title: In Sujud: Refuge in Your Pleasure
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِرِضَاكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ، وَبِمُعَافَاتِكَ مِنْ عُقُوبَتِكَ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْكَ، لَا أُحْصِي ثَنَاءً عَلَيْكَ، أَنْتَ كَمَا أَثْنَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni a‘udhu biridaka min sakhatik, wa bimu‘afatika min ‘uqubatik, wa a‘udhu bika mink. La uhsi thana’an ‘alayk, Anta kama athnayta ‘ala nafsik.
items.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in Your pleasure from Your displeasure, in Your pardon from Your punishment, and in You from You. I cannot enumerate praise of You; You are as You have praised Yourself. (In sujud.)

items.title: Between the Two Prostrations
items.arabic: رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي
items.transliteration: Rabbi-ghfir li.
items.translation: My Lord, forgive me. (Sitting between the two prostrations.)

items.title: Between the Two Prostrations (Full)
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لِي، وَارْحَمْنِي، وَاهْدِنِي، وَاجْبُرْنِي، وَعَافِنِي، وَارْزُقْنِي، وَارْفَعْنِي
items.transliteration: Allahummaghfir li, warhamni, wahdini, wajburni, wa ‘afini, warzuqni, warfa‘ni.
items.translation: O Allah, forgive me, have mercy on me, guide me, support me, protect me, provide for me, and raise me. (Sitting between the two prostrations.)

items.title: Dua of Abu Bakr (before salam)
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي ظُلْمًا كَثِيرًا، وَلَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، فَاغْفِرْ لِي مَغْفِرَةً مِنْ عِنْدِكَ، وَارْحَمْنِي، إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni zalamtu nafsi zulman kathira, wa la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa Anta, faghfir li maghfiratan min ‘indik, warhamni, innaka Antal-Ghafurur-Rahim.
items.translation: O Allah, I have wronged myself greatly, and none forgives sins but You. So grant me forgiveness from Yourself and have mercy on me; indeed You are the Most Forgiving, the Most Merciful. (Before the salam.)

items.title: Taslim (Ending the Prayer)
items.arabic: السَّلَامُ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَةُ اللهِ
items.transliteration: As-salamu ‘alaykum wa rahmatullah.
items.translation: Peace be upon you and the mercy of Allah. (Ending the prayer, turning to the right then the left.)

items.title: After Salah: La Hawla wa La Quwwata
items.arabic: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ، لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللهُ، وَلَا نَعْبُدُ إِلَّا إِيَّاهُ، لَهُ النِّعْمَةُ وَلَهُ الْفَضْلُ، وَلَهُ الثَّنَاءُ الْحَسَنُ
items.transliteration: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah, la ilaha illa Allah, wa la na‘budu illa iyyah, lahun-ni‘matu wa lahul-fadl, wa lahuth-thana’ul-hasan.
items.translation: There is no might nor power except by Allah. There is no god but Allah, and we worship none but Him; His is all favour, all grace, and all good praise. (After the prescribed prayer.)

items.title: After Fajr: Beneficial Knowledge
items.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
items.transliteration: Allahumma inni as’aluka ‘ilman nafi‘an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa ‘amalan mutaqabbala.
items.translation: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and accepted deeds. (Said after the Fajr prayer.)

items.title: Surah an-Nas
items.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ، مَلِكِ النَّاسِ، إِلَهِ النَّاسِ، مِنْ شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ، الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ، مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
items.transliteration: Qul a‘udhu bi Rabbin-nas. Malikin-nas. Ilahin-nas. Min sharril-waswasil-khannas. Alladhi yuwaswisu fi sudurin-nas. Minal-jinnati wan-nas.
items.translation: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind, the King of mankind, the God of mankind, from the evil of the retreating whisperer who whispers into the hearts of mankind, from among jinn and mankind. Recited after prayers, especially after Fajr and Maghrib.
